name: OpaqueBehaviorOfMainProgram
description: PPU(); PPU.stack(); PPU.crane(); PPU.stamp(); PPU.largeSortingConveyor(); Stack_WPType:=PPU.stack.WPType; Crane_WPType:=PPU.crane.WPType; Stamp_WPType:=PPU.stamp.WPType; Stack_WPProvided:=PPU.stack.WPProvided; Crane_Allow_Conveyor_to_Operate:=PPU.crane.Conveyor_AllowedToOperate; Crane_Allow_Stamp_to_Operate:=PPU.crane.Stamp_AllowedToOperate; Crane_PickedUpStackWP:=PPU.crane.Table.Potentiometer.AtStack AND PPU.crane.WPPickedUp; Stamp_IsStamping:=PPU.stamp.IsStamping; Stamp_WPAvailable:=PPU.Stamp.WPAvailable.DI_SwitchTrue; Stamp_AutomaticExecuteCompleted:=PPU.Stamp.AutomaticExecuteCompleted; LargeSortingConveyor_AllowedToOperate:=Crane_Allow_Conveyor_to_Operate; LargeSortingConveyor_IsSorting:=PPU.largeSortingConveyor.IsSorting; LargeSortingConveyor_AutomaticExecuteCompleted:=PPU.largeSortingConveyor.AutomaticExecuteCompleted;

name: OpaqueBehaviorOfCallAll
description: EmergencyStop := stack.EmergencyStop OR largeSortingConveyor.EmergencyStop OR stamp.EmergencyStop OR crane.SoftwareEmergency OR stamp.SoftwareEmergency; StartButton := stack.StartButton OR largeSortingConveyor.StartButton OR stamp.StartButton; crane.ACT_AutomaticExecute() AND largeSortingConveyor.ACT_AutomaticExecute()  AND stack.ACT_AutomaticExecute() AND stamp.ACT_AutomaticExecute()

name: OpaqueBehaviorOfEmergencyChecking
description: EmergencyStop := stack.EmergencyStop OR largeSortingConveyor.EmergencyStop OR stamp.EmergencyStop OR crane.SoftwareEmergency OR stamp.SoftwareEmergency;

name: OpaqueBehaviorOfStart
description: StartButton := stack.StartButton OR largeSortingConveyor.StartButton OR stamp.StartButton

name: OpaqueBehaviorOfReadyToInitialiseAgain
description: EmergencyStop := stack.EmergencyStop OR largeSortingConveyor.EmergencyStop OR stamp.EmergencyStop OR crane.SoftwareEmergency OR stamp.SoftwareEmergency; StartButton := stack.StartButton OR largeSortingConveyor.StartButton OR stamp.StartButton; IF(StartButton)THEN stamp.SoftwareEmergency:=FALSE; crane.SoftwareEmergency:=FALSE END_IF

name: OpaqueBehaviorOfSetWPParameter
description: WPType:=(Black OR White OR Metallic) AND WPProvided

name: OpaqueBehaviorOfResetVariables
description: InitCompleted:=FALSE; AutomaticExecuteCompleted:=FALSE;Conveyor_AllowToOperate:=FALSE; Stamp_AllowToOperate:=FALSE; WPPickedUP:=FALSE; WPPutDown:=FALSE; ReachedStack:=FALSE; ReachedConveyor:=FALSE; ReachedStamp:=FALSE; WPType:=NULL;

name: OpaqueBehaviorOfState
description: Table(); Check_Stack_WPProvided := Main.Stack_WPProvided; Check_Stack_WPType_Black := Main.Stack_WPType; Check_LargeSortingConveyor_IsSorting := Main.LargeSortingConveyor_IsSorting; Check_LargeSortingConveyor_AutomaticExecuteCompleted := Main.LargeSortingConveyor_AutomaticExecuteCompleted; Check_Stamp_IsStamping := Main.Stamp_IsStamping; Check_Stamp_WPAvailable := Main.Stamp_WPAvailable; Check_Stamp_AutomaticExecuteCompleted := Main.Stamp_AutomaticExecuteCompleted;

name: OpaqueBehaviorOfWPIsMetallic
description: IF(CounterVarMetallic=0)THEN Priority_Metallic:=1; ELSIF(CounterVarMetallic=1)THEN Priority_Metallic:=2; ELSIF(CounterVarMetallic=2)THEN Priority_Metallic:=3; END_IF; CounterVarMetallic:=CounterVarMetallic+1; CounterVarMetallic:=CounterVarBlack MOD 3;

name: OpaqueBehaviorOfWPIsWhite
description: IF(CounterVarWhite=0)THEN Priority_White:=1; ELSIF(CounterVarWhite=1)THEN Priority_White:=2; ELSIF(CounterVarWhite=2)THEN Priority_White:=3; END_IF; CounterVarWhite:=CounterVarWhite+1; CounterVarWhite:=CounterVarWhite MOD 3;

name: OpaqueBehaviorOfWPIsBlack
description: IF(CounterVarBlack=0)THEN Priority_Black:=1; ELSIF(CounterVarBlack=1)THEN Priority_Black:=2; ELSIF(CounterVarBlack=2)THEN Priority_Black:=3; END_IF; CounterVarBlack:=CounterVarBlack+1; CounterVarBlack:=CounterVarBlack MOD 3;

name: OpaqueBehaviorOfResetVariables
description: InitCompleted:=FALSE; AutomaticExecuteCompleted:=FALSE; WPSorted:=FALSE; IsSorting:=FALSE; WPTypeChecked:=FALSE; TargetChanged:=FALSE; WPType:=NULL; CurrentTarget:=NULL;

name: OpaqueBehaviorOfResetVariables
description: InitCompleted:=FALSE; AutomaticExecuteCompleted:=FALSE; IsStamping:=FALSE AND WPStamped:=FALSE; propValve.AO_SetPressure:=0; WPType:=NULL

name: OpaqueBehaviorOfState
description: Panel(); StartButton:=panel.StartButton; EmergencyStop:=panel.EmergencyStop; Check_Allowed_To_Operate := Main.Crane_Allow_Stamp_to_Operate; Check_WPType:=Main.Crane_WPType;

name: OpaqueBehaviorOfState
description: IF((iPosStack-delta) < AI_Position AND AI_Position < (iPosStack+delta)) THEN AtStack := TRUE; AtConveyor := FALSE; AtStamp := FALSE; ELSIF((iPosConveyor-delta) < AI_Position AND AI_Position < (iPosConveyor+delta)) THEN AtStack := FALSE; AtConveyor := TRUE; AtStamp := FALSE; ELSIF((iPosStamp-delta) < AI_Position AND AI_Position < (iPosStamp+delta)) THEN AtStack := FALSE; AtConveyor := FALSE; AtStamp := TRUE; ELSE AtStack := FALSE; AtConveyor := FALSE; AtStamp := FALSE; END_IF
